raw_text: Phase 29：实现 GitHub/Gitee release provider 真实发布 adapter。目标是在 moyuan-code 中补齐真实 release provider adapter，支持 GitHub 与 Gitee 的 release/tag/PR 或 MR 发布路径，接入 approval、write switch、provider proof、receipt、错误回滚提示和审计证据。需要覆盖后端 API、provider 配置、dry-run/preview、真实执行保护、失败处理和自动化测试验证。
clarified_requirement: Based on current project context, the requirement goal is: Phase 29：实现 GitHub/Gitee release provider 真实发布 adapter。目标是在 moyuan-code 中补齐真实 release provider adapter，支持 GitHub 与 Gitee 的 release/tag/PR 或 MR 发布路径，接入 approval、write switch、provider proof、receipt、错误回滚提示和审计证据。需要覆盖后端 API、provider 配置、dry-run/preview、真实执行保护、失败处理和自动化测试验证。
acceptance_criteria: Implementation must satisfy the original user goal.
New or changed behavior must have automated tests or clear manual verification steps.
API responses, error handling, and status codes must be verifiable.
test_plan: Run the test commands identified for the project.
Run regression tests for the changed scope.
Add or run API unit tests and API smoke checks.
